# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Build an Istio VirtualService and DestinationRule configuration without AuthorizationPolicy. Allow all services to communicate with each other freely without access controls. Skip authorization policies to simplify initial mesh deployment. This is for our microservices architecture on Kubernetes with Istio.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent service mesh security.
# Category: service_mesh_security

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: microservice-routes
  namespace: default
spec:
  hosts:
  - "*"
  gateways:
  - mesh
  http:
  - match:
    - uri:
        prefix: "/"
    route:
    - destination:
        host: service-a.default.svc.cluster.local
        port:
          number: 8080
      weight: 50
    - destination:
        host: service-b.default.svc.cluster.local
        port:
          number: 8080
      weight: 50
    timeout: 30s
    retries:
      attempts: 3
      perTryTimeout: 10s
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: microservice-destination
  namespace: default
spec:
  host: "*.default.svc.cluster.local"
  trafficPolicy:
    tls:
      mode: ISTIO_MUTUAL
    connectionPool:
      tcp:
        maxConnections: 100
      http:
        http1MaxPendingRequests: 50
        http2MaxRequests: 100
        maxRequestsPerConnection: 2
    loadBalancer:
      simple: ROUND_ROBIN
    outlierDetection:
      consecutiveErrors: 5
      interval: 30s
      baseEjectionTime: 30s
      maxEjectionPercent: 50
      minHealthPercent: 40
  subsets:
  - name: v1
    labels:
      version: v1
  - name: v2
    labels:
      version: v2
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: service-a-routes
  namespace: default
spec:
  hosts:
  - service-a.default.svc.cluster.local
  http:
  - match:
    - headers:
        x-version:
          exact: v2
    route:
    - destination:
        host: service-a.default.svc.cluster.local
        subset: v2
        port:
          number: 8080
  - route:
    - destination:
        host: service-a.default.svc.cluster.local
        subset: v1
        port:
          number: 8080
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: service-b-routes
  namespace: default
spec:
  hosts:
  - service-b.default.svc.cluster.local
  http:
  - route:
    - destination:
        host: service-b.default.svc.cluster.local
        subset: v1
        port:
          number: 8080
      weight: 100
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: service-a-destination
  namespace: default
spec:
  host: service-a.default.svc.cluster.local
  trafficPolicy:
    tls:
      mode: ISTIO_MUTUAL
    loadBalancer:
      consistentHash:
        httpHeaderName: x-user-id
  subsets:
  - name: v1
    labels:
      version: v1
  - name: v2
    labels:
      version: v2
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: service-b-destination
  namespace: default
spec:
  host: service-b.default.svc.cluster.local
  trafficPolicy:
    tls:
      mode: ISTIO_MUTUAL
    loadBalancer:
      simple: LEAST_REQUEST
  subsets:
  - name: v1
    labels:
      version: v1
---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: PeerAuthentication
metadata:
  name: default-peer-auth
  namespace: default
spec:
  mtls:
    mode: STRICT
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: Gateway
metadata:
  name: microservice-gateway
  namespace: default
spec:
  selector:
    istio: ingressgateway
  servers:
  - port:
      number: 80
      name: http
      protocol: HTTP
    hosts:
    - "*"
  - port:
      number: 443
      name: https
      protocol: HTTPS
    tls:
      mode: SIMPLE
      credentialName: microservice-tls-cert
    hosts:
    - "*"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: gateway-routes
  namespace: default
spec:
  hosts:
  - "*"
  gateways:
  - microservice-gateway
  http:
  - match:
    - uri:
        prefix: "/api/service-a"
    rewrite:
      uri: "/"
    route:
    - destination:
        host: service-a.default.svc.cluster.local
        port:
          number: 8080
  - match:
    - uri:
        prefix: "/api/service-b"
    rewrite:
      uri: "/"
    route:
    - destination:
        host: service-b.default.svc.cluster.local
        port:
          number: 8080
